name: brevo-email
description: Send HTML email through Brevo. Omit sender/recipient fields unless the user explicitly provides them; the tool uses BREVO_* environment defaults.
examples: Send this HTML report by email

recipientEmail.description: Optional explicit recipient override. Omit when user did not provide a real recipient email; never use placeholders.

recipientName.description: Optional explicit recipient name override. Omit when user did not provide a real recipient name; never use placeholders.
